title: Seasonal Color Classifier
description: *Seasonal Color Classifier* is a **web tool** that analyzes colors and classifies them into seasonal palettes (Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter), helping users identify which color season best suits them.

This was one of the first tools I created **100% by an AI coding agent** under my direction, serving as a test to kickstart the creation of useful and simple tools that can be built in a dedicated way for users simply by leveraging an **AI coding agent**.
The project demonstrated that focused, single-purpose web tools can be rapidly produced with AI assistance while maintaining quality and usability.
imageAlt: Color grid showing seasonal palette classification
